title: Have user as parameter for my_work

posts.author: Gaumondp (Patrick Gaumond)
posts.cookedHtml:
Feature: Have /my_work/ works with user_name as a parameter in URL so I can see my individual team view.

Use case: I want to see “My Work” for people in my team. I can currently use the menu to change users to get this but it’s really annoying to have to change this value for 7 people. If I could put url with the name in browser Favorites, I would be able to have all my team in a folder and see “their view” of My Work :

  • /my_wok/myself
  • /my_work/bob_smith
  • /my_work/laurence_tolhurst
  • etc…
